sourceRefs: DRAFT — built to the established template, self-audited before commit. Covers the rémunérations lexicon by profession (salaire/prime, pourboires, honoraires, droits d'auteur, bénéfices, allocations, commission), the work-register ladder (taf/boulot vs travail vs labeur), and the conditional's value system at work (polite demand, advice, reproach, regret, unconfirmed rumour). Spirals from b1.2/unit-04-hypotheses. Awaiting native-speaker review.

Progression blueprint: Alter Ego B2 (Hachette), Dossier 5 'Professionnel' ('Rémunérations' + 'Le conditionnel', p.74). Source PDF scanned; pages read visually. Content is original; the book is used only for scope/sequence, never copied.
